name: production_date_present
expression: production_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(production_date)) > 0
description: production_date is required for Production Report extraction.

name: lease_name_present
expression: lease_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lease_name)) > 0
description: lease_name is required for Production Report extraction.

name: operator_name_present
expression: operator_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(operator_name)) > 0
description: operator_name is required for Production Report extraction.

name: oil_volume_bbl_present
expression: oil_volume_bbl IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(oil_volume_bbl)) > 0
description: oil_volume_bbl is required for Production Report extraction.

name: gas_volume_mcf_present
expression: gas_volume_mcf IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(gas_volume_mcf)) > 0
description: gas_volume_mcf is required for Production Report extraction.

name: well_count_non_negative
description: well_count should be non-negative when present.

name: oil_volume_bbl_non_negative
description: oil_volume_bbl should be non-negative when present.

name: gas_volume_mcf_non_negative
description: gas_volume_mcf should be non-negative when present.

name: water_volume_bbl_non_negative
description: water_volume_bbl should be non-negative when present.

name: ngl_volume_bbl_non_negative
description: ngl_volume_bbl should be non-negative when present.
